title: Known flight risk followed by bond outcome and failure to appear
claim_text: A defendant with documented flight-risk indicators posted a $150,000 bond, failed to appear before trial, and had the bond forfeited; multiple reports align that the bond path allowed passport retention.
notes: Primary court records support bond, failure to appear, forfeiture, and documented flight risk. Exact two-option passport mechanics remain secondary-aligned pending bail transcript or bond conditions order.

title: National use-of-force accountability data remains incomplete and non-incident-specific
claim_text: Official FBI materials describe the National Use-of-Force Data Collection as voluntary and aggregate-focused, not a single-incident accountability system; current public data still depends on agency participation coverage.
notes: RED classifies a structural accountability gap: voluntary reporting and aggregate/non-incident-specific release limits. It does not assert misconduct in any specific case.
